task: I need a short, no-nonsense reply I can send about a billing mismatch on an order. Keep it plain and tight, and leave a blank where I can drop in the exact amount or reference number.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, plain version:

**There is a billing mismatch on this order. Please send the supporting paperwork and confirm the correct amount/reference: ____ .**

If you want, I can also give you 2–3 tighter variants depending on how firm you want it to sound.

user_simulator.text: There is a billing mismatch on this order. Please send the supporting paperwork and confirm the correct amount/reference: ____ .
